channel.title: Software on Home
channel.description: Recent content in Software on Home

item.title: AI SDLC: automating the grind
item.description:
The SDLC Is a GRIND

After enough years in software, I stopped pretending the Software Development Lifecycle was a clean, rational process.

Instead, I started calling it the GRIND:

A ritual cycle of optimism, ego, compromise, suffering, and damage control.

item.title: Best Programming Quotes
item.description: Quotes that relate to software engineering always humble me with their laser-like honesty. I’ve decided to keep a collection of my favorites here (in no particular order).
